name: SleekFlow
description: AI-powered omnichannel conversation suite — WhatsApp, Instagram, live chat with commerce automations across SEA.

when_to_use: WhatsApp + Instagram unified inbox for SEA e-commerce
Conversational commerce automation for retail brands
Omnichannel customer messaging across SEA markets
AI chatbot routing for WhatsApp customer queries

pros: Omnichannel inbox with strong SEA presence
AI features tuned for sales and support flows
cons: Pricing climbs with AI and contacts usage
Outside SEA, brand recognition is thinner
Not a pure API — product-centric platform
review.verdict: Respectable omnichannel conversation platform for SEA commerce — good BSP plus useful AI, priced accordingly.
review.best_for: SEA commerce teams running WhatsApp and IG sales from one inbox
review.not_for: Dev-only teams wanting a raw messaging API without CRM overhead
